message:
fix(articles): apply scroll metrics and IntersectionObserver fallback to remaining articles

Extend cross-browser scroll/reveal fixes to cmaes-article and hoeffding-article.

## cmaes-article.tsx & hoeffding-article.tsx
- Import and use getScrollMetrics() from lib/utils
- Add initial handleScroll() call on mount
- Add IntersectionObserver availability check with immediate reveal fallback
- Add/remove reveal-ready class coordination
- Wrap observer.disconnect() and class removal in cleanup function

## overprompting-visualizations.tsx
- Minor import cleanup for getScrollMetrics usage

## scroll-to-top.tsx
- Update scroll detection to use consolidated metrics

These changes complete the cross-browser scroll progress fix across
all article pages, ensuring consistent behavior on iOS Safari and
older browsers without IntersectionObserver support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
